title: We Hit a Major Milestone!
summary: Thank you all for helping The Antigle reach this incredible milestone of 1k subscribers. Here's what's coming next!
content:
Hello everyone!

I am absolutely thrilled to announce that The Antigle has reached a major milestone! This wouldn't have been possible without your incredible support, engagement, and enthusiasm for the content.

What's Next?

With this milestone behind us, I'm excited to share what's coming in the near future:

  • More Tutorials: Expanded redstone and building tutorial series
  • Live Streams: Regular live building sessions and Q&As
  • Community Projects: Opportunities for viewers to participate in builds
  • New Series: A brand new survival let's play starting next month

Thank you for being part of this journey. The best is yet to come!

- Mukund

title: Something Big is Coming...
summary: Get ready for an exciting new series that will change everything. Can you guess what it is?
content:
Hey everyone!

I've been working on something special behind the scenes, and I can't wait to share it with you all. This new project has been months in the making, and I think you're going to love it.

Hints:

  • It involves a brand new world
  • There will be community participation
  • It's bigger than anything I've done before
  • The first episode drops soon!

Stay tuned for the big reveal. Follow the channel and turn on notifications so you don't miss it!

Any guesses? Let me know in the comments!

- Mukund

title: Welcome to the New Website!
summary: The Antigle now has its own home on the web! Explore resources, watch videos, and stay updated.
content:
Welcome to the brand new The Antigle website!

This has been a long time coming, and I'm so excited to finally have a proper home for all things related to the channel. Here's what you can find here:

Features:

  • Videos Section: Browse all my YouTube videos with easy filtering
  • Resources: Download texture packs, guides, and tools
  • Updates: Stay informed about new content and announcements
  • Dark/Light Mode: Choose your preferred theme

The site is built to be fast, accessible, and easy to use. I'll be adding more features and resources over time, so check back often!

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out via the contact page.

Happy browsing!

- Mukund
